message.content:
@startuml
participant Actor as Admin
participant Interface as verifyEmail
participant Controller as VerificationController
participant User as User

Actor:::
    SAV Manager
    SAV Technician
    Scooter Owner

Interface:::
    verifyEmail

Controller:::
    VerificationController

User:::

User:::
    FillVerifyEmailForm(email, token)

Interface:::
    FormFilled

Interface:::
    VerifyVerifyEmailForm(email, token)

Interface:::
    FormVerified

alt [FormVerified is true]
    Interface:::
        verifyUser(email, code)
    end

    Interface:::
        verifyUser(email, code)
    end

    User:::
        user enabled

    Interface:::
        user enabled
    end

    Interface:::
        showErrorMessage
end

@enduml
